title: Artificial Intelligence in Everyday Life
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Artificial Intelligence is bringing about (0) revolutionary changes to many aspects of modern life. AI systems now perform complex tasks with remarkable (17) accuracy, sometimes matching or exceeding human performance. One (18) considerable concern is how AI might affect levels of human (19) creativity in fields such as art and music. The rise of (20) automation in manufacturing means fewer workers are needed on production lines, raising worries about future (21) employment. Developers must ensure AI operates within (22) ethical boundaries and respects individual rights. The (23) security of personal data collected by AI platforms must also be carefully managed to prevent misuse. Some scientists warn that machines with (24) inhuman levels of intelligence, operating beyond human control, could pose a serious threat to society.

example.text: Artificial Intelligence is bringing about (0) REVOLUTIONARY changes to many aspects of modern life. (REVOLUTION)

questions.explanation: A noun is needed after 'remarkable'; 'accurate' becomes 'accuracy' by changing '-ate' to '-acy'.
An adjective is needed before 'concern'; 'consider' becomes 'considerable' by adding the suffix '-able'.
A noun is needed after 'levels of human'; 'create' → 'creative' → 'creativity' by adding the suffix '-ivity'.
A noun is needed after 'The rise of'; 'automate' becomes 'automation' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
A noun is needed after 'future'; 'employ' becomes 'employment' by adding the suffix '-ment'.
An adjective is needed before 'boundaries'; 'ethics' becomes 'ethical' by adding the suffix '-al'.
A noun is needed after 'The'; 'secure' becomes 'security' by changing '-re' to '-rity'.
A negative adjective is needed; the prefix 'in-' is added to 'human' to mean 'beyond or lacking normal human qualities'.
